stemHtml: An aerodrome has ALS installed for two runways. Runway 03L has a 150 m displaced threshold; runway 16 has no displaced threshold. What is true about the ALS reference point for these runways?

options.a: They differ: the ALS for 03L is referenced from the threshold, while the ALS for 16 is referenced from a point 300 m from the threshold.
options.b: There is no difference — both ALS systems are referenced from the respective thresholds.
options.c: There is no difference — both ALS systems are referenced from the pavement edge.
options.d: They differ: the ALS for 03L is referenced from a point 150 m from the displaced threshold, while the ALS for 16 is referenced from the threshold.
